title: Melisse
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Melisse''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] which had a few squadrons of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] under her command. The ''Melisse'' arrived at the [[System Patrol Squadron]] above [[Farfeld II]] and attacked the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] frigate [[Dark Eye (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Dark Eye'']] and, with the help of [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]], managed to destroy it.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
